name: Eileen's Special Cheesecake
signatureBowl: Airy, moist, custard-like cheesecake with a graham cracker crust; traditional NY recipe with 20+ flavors, family-run since 1975
title: NY Cheesecake
description: Airy custard-like filling, graham crust, 20+ flavors

name: Junior's Restaurant
signatureBowl: Thick New York cheesecake on a thin sponge-cake base instead of crust; classic NYC institution since 1950
title: NY Cheesecake
description: Thick filling on thin sponge-cake base instead of crust

name: Peter Luger
signatureBowl: Classic New York cheesecake (rich, dense, creamy with a sour tang) sourced from outside bakery, served with a dollop of homemade schlag (whipped cream)
title: Cheesecake With Schlag
description: Rich, dense, sour-tangy classic; homemade whipped cream

name: La Cheesecake
signatureBowl: Light, fluffy crustless NY-style cheesecake with a chewy sponge-cake crust and silky cream cheese core; neighborhood favorite since 1985
title: Crustless NY Cheesecake
description: Light, fluffy, chewy sponge-cake crust, silky cream cheese core

name: Mah-Ze-Dahr Bakery
signatureBowl: Dense, sweet cheesecake with lemon zest and vanilla bean; creamy tang offset by a harder crust
title: Lemon Vanilla Cheesecake
description: Dense, sweet, lemon zest, vanilla bean, harder crust

name: Sarge's Delicatessen
signatureBowl: Massive, dense classic NY-style cheesecake (3+ inches) with a dappled surface; tangy cream cheese, notably salty
title: NY Cheesecake
description: Massive, 3+ inches, tangy cream cheese, notably salty

name: Veniero's Pasticceria & Caffe
signatureBowl: Deep-dish crustless New York cheesecake with fresh ricotta and whole eggs; creamy, delicate, tangy; landmark since 1894
title: Ricotta Cheesecake
description: Deep-dish, crustless, fresh ricotta, whole eggs, creamy and tangy

name: Francie
signatureBowl: Reimagined guava cheesecake by pastry chef Justin Binnie: creamy cheesecake piped into dehydrated guava puree with prickly pear sorbet, dragon fruit and coconut-lime pudding
title: Guava Cheesecake
description: Dehydrated guava, prickly pear sorbet, dragon fruit, coconut-lime pudding

name: Junoon
signatureBowl: Cheesecake with an Indian twist: cream cheese blended with hung dahi (curd), whipped cream and butternut squash, with a jaggery-cardamom crumble and dragon fruit sorbet
title: Indian-Spiced Cheesecake
description: Hung dahi, butternut squash, jaggery-cardamom crumble, dragon fruit sorbet

name: Caputo's Bake Shop
signatureBowl: Straightforward crustless cheesecake with a classic look and sweeter profile; among the most affordable in the city
title: Crustless Cheesecake
description: Classic look, sweeter profile, among the most affordable

name: Carnegie Deli
signatureBowl: Dense, creamy cheesecake with a thick cookie crust; counter located inside Madison Square Garden
title: NY Cheesecake
description: Dense, creamy, thick cookie crust; inside Madison Square Garden

name: Mia's Brooklyn Bakery
signatureBowl: Two-textured cheesecake with a thick fudgy top and molten lava-cake center; hidden graham cracker crust
title: Lava Cheesecake
description: Fudgy top, molten center, hidden graham cracker crust

name: S & S Cheesecake
signatureBowl: Smooth, dense crustless cheesecake from the original 1960 recipe; lightly sweet with subtle sourness and a sandy crust; supplies local shops including Peter Luger
title: Crustless Cheesecake
description: Smooth, dense, lightly sweet, subtle sourness, sandy crust

name: Stu's Cheesecake
signatureBowl: Hand-delivered cheesecake with a signature crack; creamy center with breadier cake-like edges and no chemical aftertaste
title: Cracked-Top Cheesecake
description: Creamy center, breadier cake-like edges, no chemical aftertaste

name: The Cheesecake Factory
signatureBowl: Soft, wobbly, slightly tangy cheesecake with Nilla Wafer nostalgia; Queens Center Mall location
title: Original Cheesecake
description: Soft, wobbly, slightly tangy, Nilla Wafer nostalgia

name: Breads Bakery
signatureBowl: Basque-style cheesecake with vanilla and lemon zest and a caramelized top; seasonal varieties
title: Basque Cheesecake
description: Vanilla, lemon zest, caramelized top, seasonal varieties

name: Harbs
signatureBowl: Mille crepes cake with cream cheese and blueberries; classic NY cheesecake also available
title: Blueberry Mille Crepes
description: Cream cheese and blueberries; classic NY cheesecake also available

name: Keki Modern Cakes
signatureBowl: Japanese-style 'Original Fancy' cheesecake with premium cheese and creme fraiche
title: Japanese Cheesecake
